fields.name: Capacity Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the absence entry is related to a machine center or a work center.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the absence. If the absence covers several days, there will be an entry line for each day.

fields.name: Starting Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting time of the absence, such as the time the employee normally starts to work or the time the machine starts to operate.

fields.name: Ending Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending time of day of the absence, such as the time the employee normally leaves, or the time the machine stops operating.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a short description of the reason for the absence.

fields.name: Capacity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of capacity, which cannot be used during the absence period.

fields.name: Starting Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and the starting time, which are combined in a format called "starting date-time".

fields.name: Ending Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and the ending time, which are combined in a format called "ending date-time".
